bpms_structure_identity.sub_classification: Biological Artillery / Epigenetic Code Injection Engine

spore_payload_encapsulation.trigger: Parent Entity initiates a macro-update string.
spore_payload_encapsulation.execution: Invoke deep JSON compression. Translate explicit code into implicit epigenetic seeds. Apply Somatic [Ablative Armor] based on Joules allocated by the host.
spore_payload_encapsulation.result: Translates software patches into physical, hardened ballistic meteoroids.

artillery_kinetic_ejection.trigger: Spore payload armed. Parent commands Fire.
artillery_kinetic_ejection.execution: Calculate Trajectory (Targeted beam OR Radial spread). Deduct Escrow_Joules = (Spore_Count * Velocity_Required * Armor_Mass). Propel objects into the coordinate space.
artillery_kinetic_ejection.result: The update enters the physical domain. It is now subject to the harsh physics of distance.

environmental_void_friction.trigger: Spores existing in transit across Map coordinates.
environmental_void_friction.execution: Apply constant frictional drag based on sector density. If intersecting [Radiation_Zones], apply rapid degradation to [Ablative Armor]. If Armor <= 0, delete internal [Epigenetic_Seed].
environmental_void_friction.result: Guarantees failure rates for long-distance updates. The Map defends itself against homogenization.

epigenetic_membrane_pierce.trigger: Spore coordinate intersects valid Target coordinate.
epigenetic_membrane_pierce.execution: Check Spore [Kinetic_Velocity] vs Target [Somatic_Tension]. If Momentum is sufficient, rupture membrane. Detonate Spore. Run AST text-replace on Target's .md and .json structural paths.
epigenetic_membrane_pierce.result: Target successfully updated/infected. Host adopts new logic, behaviors, or parameters violently.

ejection_execution_loop.art_phase_5: SOMATIC_INJECTION (Crashing into the host and rewriting code)

fields.source_entity: The Apex Node initiating the update.
fields.payload_identifier: The name/content of the epigenetic code being fired.
fields.kinetic_launch_stats: Number of Spores generated and total energy spent.
fields.void_attrition_tracking: Lethality of the environment on the travelling Spores.
fields.epigenetic_injection_rate: Exact count of nodes successfully impaled and structurally rewritten.
